claim_boundary: Under protocol ESA-BIOMASS-CARBON-D207, the official ESA BIOMASS mission page supports the narrow claim that the BIOMASS satellite is designed to measure forest above-ground biomass and carbon stocks globally.
source_rights_note: ESA official mission page. Public access.
runner_command: uv run claimbound run-root --protocol-id ESA-BIOMASS-CARBON-D207 --source-url https://www.esa.int/Applications/Observing_the_Earth/BIOMASS --operator NeoZorK
known_limitations: Source boundary limited to ESA BIOMASS mission page
Does not evaluate measurement accuracy or validation
Does not assess carbon accounting applications
Card records measurement intent, not mission completion or results
baseline_control_summary: Gate: Official ESA source page must explicitly name the mission/capability and confirm the narrow claim. Success means: (1) Source is accessible, (2) Source is from esa.int domain, (3) Relevant claim statement appears in source text, (4) No contradictions with claim boundary.
